post_install.subtitle: ONCard 1.1.6 tightens the feel of navigation, sound feedback, and search interactions across the app.
post_install.text1: This update focuses on how ONCard feels in motion. Search suggestions now behave more like a proper floating layer above the card surface, the top navigation reflects active state more clearly with matching white icons, and transitions across the interface feel more intentional and consistent.
post_install.text2:
- Search suggestions now open above the cards instead of disrupting the layout.
- Main navigation uses white icon variants when a dark active tab is selected.
- Tab and card transitions have been smoothed out with stronger motion polish.
- Launch and action sound effects were cleaned up so only navigation keeps the woosh effect.

whats_new.title: Welcome to ONCard 1.1.6
whats_new.description: This update sharpens the UI with cleaner search overlays, better active-state navigation, and smoother motion.
points: Search suggestions now float above the cards and show their results more reliably.
Selected Create and Cards tabs switch to matching white icons for better contrast.
Navigation and result transitions were refined for a smoother visual flow.
Sound feedback was simplified so routine actions use click while navigation keeps the woosh.
